- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project requirements are specified: full-stack educational platform with React/Vite frontend and Django/DRF backend

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Project structure created with frontend and backend folders, basic React and Django setup

- [x] Customize the Project
	Added models, serializers, views, urls for all Django apps; created React components and pages; updated dependencies

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed

- [x] Compile the Project
	Installed dependencies for backend and frontend

- [x] Create and Run Task
	No single task needed, users can run backend and frontend separately

- [x] Launch the Project
	Backend: cd backend && python manage.py runserver. Frontend: cd frontend && npm run dev

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and copilot-instructions.md exist and contain current project information
